title: Sanarwa
subtitle: Sabunta kwamitin nakasa da wasannin daidaita
markAllErrorTitle: An kasa sanya alamar an karanta duka
markAllErrorMessage: Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
emptyText: Lokacin da aka buɗe shari'ar bita ta nakasa, aka yanke hukunci, ko aka ƙirƙiri wasan ƙarar gwabza a tarihinka, zai bayyana a nan.
peerResponsesHint: Danna don buɗe shari'ar da abin ya shafa a kayan aikin kwamiti.
tieBreakFallbackSubject: Ana buƙatar ƙarar gwabza ta zagaye
